testsuite.name: com.billing.charge.calculation.internal.step.StepAllRegisteredTypesProcessedPropertyTest

timestamp = 2026-02-28T19:13:38.975511, StepAllRegisteredTypesProcessedPropertyTest:usageFeeStepShouldProduceResultsForAllRegisteredTypes = |-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 100 | # of calls to property checks = 100 | # of not rejected calls generation = RANDOMIZED | parameters are randomly generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 32 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 16 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = 5021232585082959853 | random seed to reproduce generated values
timestamp = 2026-02-28T19:13:38.990669, StepAllRegisteredTypesProcessedPropertyTest:oneTimeFeeStepShouldProduceResultsForAllRegisteredTypes = |-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 100 | # of calls to property checks = 100 | # of not rejected calls generation = RANDOMIZED | parameters are randomly generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 8 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 6 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = -8435461425885327285 | random seed to reproduce generated values
